title: RSW Make Your Own Santa Christmas Crackers – 6 Pack 12" DIY Festive Crackers with Hats & Mottos – Fun Family Christmas Activity
features: MAKE YOUR OWN CRACKERS – DIY cracker set allows you to fill with your own gifts and surprises
6-PACK OF 12-INCH CRACKERS – Perfect for family gatherings, school parties and festive dinners
FUN SANTA DESIGN – Bold red crackers with Santa suit, belt and holly hat details
COMPLETE WITH ESSENTIALS – Includes snaps, paper hats and mottos – just add your own fillers
ENGAGING CHRISTMAS ACTIVITY – A fun festive project for children and adults before the big day
description: Add a creative twist to your Christmas table with the RSW Make Your Own Santa Christmas Crackers. This pack includes six 12-inch crackers featuring a bold red Santa suit design with belt, suit details and holly decoration. Unlike pre-filled crackers, this DIY set lets you personalise each cracker with your own choice of treats, small gifts, or surprises – perfect for making your Christmas celebration unique. Each cracker includes a snap, paper hat and festive motto, so all you need to do is fill them, twist them closed and place them on the table. The larger 12-inch size ensures they make a statement at your Christmas dinner, family gathering, school party or festive event. A great hands-on activity for children and adults alike, these make-your-own crackers are a fun way to get into the holiday spirit and create a personalised touch for every guest at the table.
